author: jonasdoesthings
description: Quickly toggle the visibility of specific folders in the file navigator based on configured names. Useful for hiding attachment folders.
name: Hide Folders

releases.author: JonasDoesThings
releases.description:
## What's changed
This release modernizes many parts of the plugin and implements obsidian best-practices to eliminate warnings in the new obsidian plugin community overview.  

Please report any issues you encounter!

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JonasDoesThings/obsidian-hide-folders/compare/1.5.2...1.5.3

releases.author: JonasDoesThings
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix: only target folders in the nav-files-container view to not interfere with foreign plugins (resolved issue #24 and https://github.com/johansan/notebook-navigator/issues/363)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JonasDoesThings/obsidian-hide-folders/compare/1.5.1...1.5.2

releases.author: JonasDoesThings
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* update mutationObserver with debounce to improve performance and increase detection of file-explorer updates by @luckman212 in https://github.com/JonasDoesThings/obsidian-hide-folders/pull/16

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JonasDoesThings/obsidian-hide-folders/compare/1.5.0...1.5.1

releases.author: JonasDoesThings
releases.description:

**Support my work**: https://buymeacoffee.com/jonasdoesthings

releases.author: JonasDoesThings
releases.description: ## What's New feat: add experimental compatibility setting for [quick-explorer](https://github.com/pjeby/quick-explorer) refactor: add possibility to add further compatibility settings in the future docs: add .github/FUNDING.yml You can find experimental settings by clicking on the "experimental settings section" on the bottom of the settings screen to expand it. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JonasDoesThings/obsidian-hide-folders/compare/1.3.0...1.4.0 **Support my work**: https://buymeacoffee.com/jonasdoesthings

releases.author: JonasDoesThings
releases.description:

fix: save the plugin's hidden/shown state when toggling visibility to persist state between obsidian restarts (closes #8)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JonasDoesThings/obsidian-hide-folders/compare/1.2.2...1.2.3

releases.description:

releases.author: JonasDoesThings
releases.description:
## What's New
Due to the highly-appreciated contribution by @joaoxmb in PR #7  issue #5 and #6 should be fixed now. 🥳🎉 

## New Contributors
* @joaoxmb made their first contribution in https://github.com/JonasDoesThings/obsidian-hide-folders/pull/7

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JonasDoesThings/obsidian-hide-folders/compare/1.2.0...1.2.1
releases.name: v1.2.1 // folder hiding bugfix

releases.author: JonasDoesThings
releases.description:
## What's New
* Support the `startsWith::` prefix-selector, so for example you can use `startsWith::_` to hide all folders starting with a `_` (closes #3)

* Bug Fix: Prevent the whole file tree from being hidden when having an empty `endsWith::` in your configuration

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JonasDoesThings/obsidian-hide-folders/compare/1.1.1...1.2.0
releases.name: v1.2.0 // startsWith:: support

releases.author: JonasDoesThings
releases.description:
# What's New
* Closes #4 (automatically update hidden folders when changing settings)
* Fixes that you would previously need to un-hide and re-hide folders when creating a new one before it get's hidden

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JonasDoesThings/obsidian-hide-folders/compare/1.1.0...1.1.1
releases.name: 1.1.1 // Bug Fixes

releases.author: JonasDoesThings
releases.description:
## What's New
This version adds support for hiding folders ending with a specific suffix by using the `endsWith::` prefix.  
For example you can use this to hide all folders ending with `_trash` using the following: `endsWith::_trash`

Closes #2 

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JonasDoesThings/obsidian-hide-folders/compare/1.0.3...1.1.0
releases.name: 1.1.0 // endsWith:: support

releases.author: JonasDoesThings
releases.description:
## What's New
* Fixed an issue where an empty folders to hide configuration would lead to the whole file explorer tree to be hidden.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JonasDoesThings/obsidian-hide-folders/compare/1.0.2...1.0.3

releases.author: JonasDoesThings
releases.description:
## What's New
* Added an option to turn-off case-insensitive matching of folder names
* Fixed that root-level folders wouldn't get matched

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JonasDoesThings/obsidian-hide-folders/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2
